name: ytm-loudness-normalizer
description: Normalize YouTube Music loudness to a custom target.

scripts.zip: npm run zip:chrome && npm run zip:firefox
scripts.release:build: npm run build && npm run zip
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:build
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:build
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:build
